name: Christmas Day Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F and prepare muffin pans.
2. In a saucepan, heat the first four ingredients gently until the butter has melted.
3. Sift the flour, mixed spice, cinnamon, and salt into a large bowl.
4. Stir in the bran flakes and raw sugar.
5. Lightly beat the eggs.
6. Add the baking soda to the heated mixture, then pour it and the beaten eggs into the dry ingredients.
7. Mix until just combined.
8. Spoon the batter into paper Christmas muffin cups or pans.
9. Place a cherry on top of each muffin.
10. Bake for about 15 minutes or until the muffins spring back when lightly touched.
11. Dust with icing sugar if desired and serve warm. Makes 12.
